shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Here’s a fresh, professional, and SEO-optimized meta description for Reflex Plus Beef & Game Adult Cat Food (Pouch) with no repetition from earlier ones:.
description: Reflex Plus Beef & Game Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Pouch ,fully-balanced, beef and game protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 0.3 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Manganese - 100 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 5% min., game 4% min.), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
